chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D – 1828 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1.For order on Misc. No. 8300/22 (urgent) 2.For order on Misc. No. 8301/22 (exemption) 3.For order on Misc. No. 8302/22 (stay) 4.For hearing of main case 25.03.2022 Mr. Taimur Ali Mirza, advocate for petitioner --------- 1. Urgency application is granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3-4. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, DAG, is present in Court and has waived notice on behalf of the respondents. Since an Appeal bearing No. 588/KB/2022 along with stay application is pending before the Income Tax Tribunal, we direct the Tribunal to take up the stay application, if not appeal and decide the same in accordance with law within fifteen days from the date of receipt of this order. Till such date, no coercive measures for recovery be adopted. Instant petition stands disposed of along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ashraf
